title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Gaborone City Council Day-care Centre Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Gaborone City Council Day-care Centre Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Gaborone City Council Day-Care Centre Bye-laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.
